channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-5379] Get error when has many rules in nrs tbf policy
item.description:
When i add so many rules, like:
lctl set_param ost.OSS.ost_io.nrs_tbf_rule="start rule1

{192.0.8.122@o2ib}

10"
lctl set_param ost.OSS.ost_io.nrs_tbf_rule="start rule2

{192.0.8.123@o2ib}

10"
lctl set_param ost.OSS.ost_io.nrs_tbf_rule="start rule3

{192.0.8.124@o2ib}

10"

{192.3.9.211@o2ib}

10"
It succeed, however, when i try to cat the rules, it failed, like:

  1. cat nrs_tbf_rule
    cat: nrs_tbf_rule: No space left on device
item.summary: Get error when has many rules in nrs tbf policy

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Nathaniel

Could you please take care of this patch?

Thanks

Peter
Here is the patch for this problem: http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/11154/
